scopeConflicts.explanation: Source is Heersink School of Medicine landing page (medical-school level); institution is UAB Hospital. Classifier left scope as INSTITUTION_SPECIFIC but content is school-level — campus applicability not explicitly stated.

IVMS page is owned by UAB Heersink School of Medicine; institution under review is UAB Hospital. Implicit campus link exists (clinical rotations occur at UAB Hospital) but no explicit campusApplicabilityProof for the hospital institution.
Same Heersink-school source feeds all IVMS PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims. Defensible because UAB IVMS clinical rotations occur at UAB Hospital, but record the school-vs-hospital scope note for the regate.

overpromotionDetected.reason: SCOPE_CONFLICT claim self-describes a medical-school vs hospital mismatch yet was promoted to PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE.
